title: montia exigua
intro: Montia exigua, also known as Least Purslane, is a small, succulent annual plant native to North America. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and astringent effects, which can help to soothe skin irritations, wounds, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Montia exigua include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate sore throats, and treat respiratory issues, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Montia exigua can be prepared for medicinal use through infusions, decoctions, and salves, allowing for a range of herbal preparations to be made from its leaves and stems.
